title: Solin, Split-Dalmatia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Solin, Split-Dalmatia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Solin is a city in Split-Dalmatia with a population of 24,000. An ancient town near Split, home to the impressive ruins of Salona, the Roman capital of Dalmatia, with a rich early Christian heritage.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
